articles.title: PH beach handball team upsets Brazil at world championships
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines—From barely making the main round, the Philippine women’s beach handball team is now on the verge of its best finish ever in the IHF Beach Handball World Championships in Zagreb, Croatia. The national team, collectively known as the Amigas, scored the biggest upset of the tournament late Thursday with a 2-1 win over three-time champion Brazil. READ: PH handball team ramps up buildup for world championships The Amigas have surpassed their 12th-place finish two years ago in China, a feat that first put the Philippines on the radar. “People here were cheering us. articles.title: Turkey - USA live: hosts chase top spot as Group D reaches finale
articles.description: The United States face Turkey on Friday in the final Group D matchday, kicking off at 4am CEST from Los Angeles. The USMNT, already qualified, pursue an unbeaten record and top-spot confirmation. Simultaneously in San Francisco, Australia and Paraguay, both on three points, battle for the group's second qualifying berth; a loss might mean elimination. Follow our liveblog to see how it unfolds.
